task_objective: Enhance file browser with directory-first sorting and folder icons.
design_decisions: Implemented directory-first sorting by separating items into two lists (dirs and files) before combining them.
Used Streamlit's format_func in st.selectbox to add emojis (📁 for folders, ⤴️ for parent directory) to the display while keeping underlying values as raw strings.
Kept file display without icons to maintain a clean interface as requested.
results: File browser now displays directories at the top with folder icons. All tests pass.
